summary: Mine candidate sources, evaluate quality and license fit, and assemble a dossier for workflow or agent promotion.

inputs.name: coverage_gap
inputs.description: What is missing in current references or route coverage.

outputs.name: candidate_source_pack
outputs.description: Curated source list with provenance and license notes.

outputs.name: dossier_seed
outputs.description: Ready-to-promote dossier draft for the target workflow or agent.

budget.notes: Stay narrow: source quality, provenance, and promotion readiness only.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is reference intake or dossier building, not broad runtime implementation.
Require a named target and coverage gap before source mining begins.
Do not recommend promotion when provenance or license metadata is incomplete.
Return sources, evaluation notes, and dossier seed with explicit promotion status.

steps.action: Gather candidate official, vendor, and GitHub sources that fit the target coverage gap.
Score source quality, maintenance, and testability signals.
Review license compatibility, duplication risk, and staging-readiness.
Merge the source pack, evaluation notes, and promotion decision into a dossier seed.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read current references, source maps, and rule files.

tools.name: shell.readonly
tools.purpose: Run lightweight local inspection commands during source triage.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write dossier artifacts in approved reference paths.

verification.method: Check every source entry includes URL, type, license, and intended use.
Check incompatible or unclear licenses are surfaced before promotion.
Check the dossier explains why the target remains draft, staging, or production.

success_criteria: The source pack prioritizes primary and maintainable references over generic discovery links.
The evaluation summary makes license and duplication risk obvious.
The resulting dossier is promotion-ready for staging without bypassing provenance checks.

rollback.when: If provenance or license data is incomplete, revert to candidate-source notes and block promotion until the gaps are filled.
